renames.rationale: Wraps __stdio_common_vsprintf_s; called by many logging stubs (FUN_14000f0d0/f8f0/f7c0/fa20/f690/f020/f3b0) to format log message buffers.
Format strings '<- %s [%d]' indicate function-exit trace logging. Called by every service:: method as the exit logger; uses timeGetTime for timestamp.
Strings 'service::service','CreateServiceImplementation','DestroyServiceImplementation','Can't load service dll.' Loads service DLL via LoadLibraryW + GetProcAddress; service constructor.
Called only by FUN_140015710 (likely dtor thunk); invokes guard_dispatch_icall + CloseHandle + FreeLibrary, mirror of service__ctor cleanup path.
Tiny 16-instr wrapper that calls FUN_14002f180 then service__dtor; matches destructor thunk pattern for service object.
String 'service::StopService' + SetEvent call to signal service stop; entry trace via log_trace_exit pair pattern.
String 'service::run_as_service','Failed to register control handler.' Calls RegisterServiceCtrlHandlerExW + GetMessageW/DispatchMessageW + MsgWaitForMultipleObjectsEx; SCM main loop.
Strings 'service::on_control_handler','service_manager::unprotect_service'. SCM control-handler callback dispatching control codes; called by FUN_140016eb0 (control handler thunk).
String 'service::uninit'; CloseHandle of service handles and final report_status call. Service teardown.
String 'service::report_status' + SetServiceStatus call; SCM status reporter used by run_as_service and uninit.
String 'service::register_service_events','events map is empty'; iterates an events map registering service event sinks.
String 'service::unregister_service_events'; mirror of register_service_events using same FUN_140016ed0 helper. Called by run_as_service on shutdown.
Strings 'service::is_command_trusted','bdservicehost.'; uses __std_fs_get_stats — checks command file/path against trust policy for SCM control.
Strings 'service::remove_trust_command_file','bdservicehost.','Failed to remove file: '; deletes trust-command file used by IPC. Called from run_as_service.
10-instr stub whose sole callee is on_control_handler; matches the trampoline registered via RegisterServiceCtrlHandlerExW.
Called by both register_service_events and unregister_service_events; uses operator_new + FUN_140017180/16fb0 — likely event-map element constructor/iterator.
